title: IMF Strength Explorer — Boiling Points vs. IMF Type
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Bar-chart MicroSim showing how IMF categories correlate with boiling points, with filters and molecule explanations.

learningObjectives: Compare boiling points across IMF categories
Explain why hydrogen bonding elevates boiling points

keyQuestions: Why do molecules with hydrogen bonding boil at higher temperatures?
How does molar mass influence dispersion forces?
commonMisconceptions: Dispersion forces are always weak regardless of molar mass
Dipole interactions are stronger than hydrogen bonding
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to identify which molecules are paramagnetic by inspection of IMF data
